description_long: This is a cylindrical pendant lamp with a geometric patterned outer shade, suspended from a single cord. The outer shade features a repeating grid or lattice design, giving it a modern and slightly decorative appearance. The top of the lamp has a structural frame that connects the shade to the cord, with visible support arms converging at the center. The lamp is designed to hang from the ceiling, with the light source housed inside the cylindrical enclosure. The surface appears to be made of a matte, possibly powder-coated metal, with a uniform light color. The overall design is minimalist, making it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or exteriors.
description: A modern cylindrical pendant lamp with a geometric lattice-patterned shade, suspended from a single cord. The lamp features a minimalist design with a matte finish and visible structural supports at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cylindrical shade with the geometric pattern and the central cord attachment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical form and the angled support arms connecting the shade to the cord.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the geometric pattern and central cord visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the angled support arms and the cylindrical shade.
